label: Transparent lilac-breasted roller motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lilac Breasted Roller transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated lilac-breasted roller plumage motif on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined lilac-breasted roller motif combining one elegant roller wing plume and breast feather fan with accurate lilac throat and breast, vivid turquoise-blue wing coverts, chestnut back accents, deep green savanna wing shadows, crisp dark feather tips, natural feather barbs, and a bright content-system feel. The subject should be an artful bird-plumage cutout, not a full bird portrait.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full feather silhouette without cropping; no environment, no branch, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving lilac, turquoise, chestnut, and green feather detail with crisp silhouette edges.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no savanna landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Lilac Breasted Roller" / "Lilac Breasted Roller" using the motif of lilac-breasted roller plumage from savanna woodland.
Visual identity: bright content system, refined editorial product UI, lilac breast surfaces, electric turquoise wing accents, chestnut back details, savanna green navigation states, cream daylight surfaces, warm twig neutrals, precise readable content panels, crisp media-card and dashboard workflows.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, content cards, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, radio controls, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, slim feather-bar dividers, roller-wing turquoise active states, lilac content highlights, chestnut warning/accent states, savanna-green success states, daylight cards, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic content and product UI terms such as Overview, Content Index, Health, Status, Form, Table, Reach, Conversion, Active, Pending, Draft, Publish.
Palette names visible: Daylight Cream #fff8ec, Roller Ink #172522, Lilac Breast #c78ab8, Turquoise Wing #13a9c7, Chestnut Back #a75632, Savanna Green #6f8f45, Sky Feather #8bd8e6, Twig Taupe #b89870, Nectar Focus #f1bf3f, Deep Canopy #26391f.
Canvas and legibility: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, large readable labels, no dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no full bird portrait, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 dark-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Lilac Breasted Roller" / "Lilac Breasted Roller", translated from the same lilac-breasted roller plumage motif from savanna woodland.
Visual identity: bright content system translated to dark mode, deep canopy and roller-ink backgrounds, luminous lilac breast active states, electric turquoise wing highlights, chestnut back accents, savanna green success/navigation states, warm cream foregrounds, precise readable content panels, crisp dashboard and publishing workflows.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, content cards, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, radio controls, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, slim feather-bar dividers, dark canopy panels, turquoise active rings, lilac content highlights, chestnut warning/accent states, savanna-green success states, readable dark cards, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic content and product UI terms such as Overview, Content Index, Health, Status, Form, Table, Reach, Conversion, Active, Pending, Draft, Publish.
Palette names visible: Deep Canopy #26391f, Daylight Cream #fff8ec, Roller Ink #172522, Lilac Breast #c78ab8, Turquoise Wing #13a9c7, Chestnut Back #a75632, Savanna Green #6f8f45, Sky Feather #8bd8e6, Twig Taupe #b89870, Nectar Focus #f1bf3f.
Canvas and legibility: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, large readable labels, no dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no full bird portrait, no other animals, no neon cyberpunk palette, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no pure black flat background, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
